howToUse: Read this file + the in_progress phase file(s) each session. Statuses: pending | in_progress | done. Keep statuses and notes current — this plan is the source of truth, not chat history.
roadmapNote: Phases 0–9 shipped the original editor; v0.2.0 beta is published (Developer ID signed; notarization best-effort/pending). Phases 10–15 are the 'compete with CleanShot X' chapter — see competitive-cleanshot.md for the benchmark + gap analysis. Sequenced interleaved per the user: editor bugs first (10), then menu-bar/capture + Quick Access Overlay (11), then SCREEN RECORDING (12, flagged top-priority by the user: region/full, audio-input choice, record to MP4 + GIF + WebP), then video editing + remaining polish (13), then the expanded annotation toolset (14: redaction, step counter) and power capture (15: scrolling + window capture). Cloud upload/sharing is intentionally a SEPARATE later track, not in 10–15. Post-1.0 candidate list lives in backlog.md.

phases.title: Infrastructure: repo, CI, site, release pipeline
Canvas & viewport: Metal-backed view, zoom/pan, selection
Annotations & text: arrows, shapes, highlights, text blocks
Transform tools: crop UI, resize, skew
Layers UX: panel, promote-to-layer, effects, persistence
Polish: liquid glass everywhere, animations, signing, perf pass
Screenshot capture & history (user request; preempts phase 2 remainder)
Critical editor fixes: undo/redo, arrow redesign, annotation-shadow bug
Menu-bar app & capture overrides (tray, ⌘⇧3/⌘⇧4, slide-down history, edit round-trip)
Screen recording (⌘⇧5): region/full, audio device, floating stop, into history
Editor polish + video edit: text font/scale, color picker + MRU, playback/trim/crop, MP4/GIF/WebP export
Annotation toolset expansion: redaction (blur/pixelate), step counter, curved arrows follow-through, spotlight, pencil
Power capture: scrolling capture, window capture (smart detection), freeze-screen, self-timer
